chinese · music · tools & games

谜
谜语日
riddleyu
A daily 成语 puzzle. Decode the ancient four-character idiom from cryptic clues — one chance each day.
成语dailypuzzle
龙
歌词接龙
gecijielong
Chain Mandarin song lyrics together. Each player continues where the last left off — a flowing dragon of verse.
lyricschainmusic

geciqiao
A bridge between songs and language learning. Study Mandarin through the lyrics of artists you love.

gumai
Trace the pulse of classical Chinese. Explore the living network of ancient texts and their echoes through time.

zhujie
